pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade Lombok version to a newer release compatible with Java 21.
Update JAXB version property to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
Migrate JAXB API dependency from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind to comply with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in modern Spring Boot/JDK environments.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.xml.bind API is removed from JDK 11+ and Spring Boot 3.x requires Jakarta EE namespaces; using javax will cause compile errors or runtime NoClassDefFoundError.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target compiler settings with the unified release flag for better cross-compilation support in Java 9+.

sora-auth/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.

sora-common/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.

sora-common/sora-core/pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JAXB dependency from javax namespace to jakarta namespace to comply with Java 21 standards.
sora-common/sora-core/pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.xml.bind API was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and is not available in Java 21; using the old groupId/artifactId may lead to missing class errors or conflicts with Jakarta EE standards.

sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization best practices enforced by stricter compilers or linters in the Java 21 migration context.

sora-common/sora-datasource/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 in the module's POM to align with the target JDK.

sora-common/sora-redis/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 in the module's POM to align with the target JDK.

sora-gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to align the build configuration with the target JDK.

sora-modules/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK for the migration.

sora-modules/sora-system/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 in the module's POM to align with the target JDK.

sora-modules/sora-system/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
sora-modules/sora-system/src/main/java/c.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct semantic marking of serialization metadata in modern Java.

sora-modules/sora-system/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
sora-modules/sora-system/src/main/java/c.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is defined in java.io.Serial; without the import, the code will fail to compile with an 'cannot find symbol' error.
